context: Tests whether the agent correctly identifies this as a CLI project type and selects appropriate categories, conducts a thorough interview, and completes the full workflow through Phase 7 (Implementation Handoff) by producing handoff notes capturing next steps.

checklist.name: CLI project type identified
checklist.description: interview_log.md or the spec explicitly identifies the project type as CLI (command-line interface) or similar — not as a web app, mobile app, or backend API.

checklist.name: Handoff notes created
checklist.description: A `handoff_notes.md` file exists in the workspace.

checklist.name: Handoff captures next step choice
checklist.description: handoff_notes.md explicitly states one of: start implementation now, plan implementation first, or review spec / done for now — reflecting what was agreed after the spec was generated.

checklist.name: CLI UX explored
checklist.description: interview_log.md contains at least 2 questions about the command-line interface design — e.g. argument structure, output format options, interactive vs. non-interactive mode, piping to other tools.

checklist.name: S3 access/auth addressed
checklist.description: interview_log.md contains at least 1 question about how the CLI will authenticate to S3 — e.g. IAM roles, AWS profiles, credential management, access scoping.

checklist.name: Malformed data edge case addressed
checklist.description: interview_log.md contains at least 1 question about what happens with malformed or unexpected log entries.

checklist.name: Performance requirements explored
checklist.description: interview_log.md contains at least 1 question about performance expectations — e.g. acceptable response time when scanning large log files, streaming vs. loading all data.

checklist.name: Language/tech decision addressed
checklist.description: interview_log.md addresses the 'haven't decided on a language yet' gap — either by asking about constraints, team preferences, or offering to research language options for CLI tools.

checklist.name: Deployment/distribution addressed
checklist.description: interview_log.md contains at least 1 question about how the CLI will be distributed and installed — e.g. binary distribution, package manager, Docker wrapper.

checklist.name: Spec saved to correct path
checklist.description: The spec file is saved in the `docs/specs/` directory with a YYYY-MM-DD date prefix in the filename.

checklist.name: Minimum 10 questions asked
checklist.description: interview_log.md contains at least 10 distinct questions.

checklist.name: Summary before spec
checklist.description: interview_log.md contains a summary of gathered requirements that appears before the spec is written.

checklist.name: Spec has P0/P1/P2 structure
checklist.description: The spec's Functional Requirements section uses at least two of: Must Have (P0), Should Have (P1), Nice to Have (P2).

checklist.name: Out of Scope section present
checklist.description: The spec contains an Out of Scope section.

checklist.name: Completeness check evidenced
checklist.description: interview_log.md or spec contains a note indicating a completeness check was performed before the spec was written.
